spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy (p-6, p-8). Container padding p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid protocol (Control Room mode for dashboard). Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Fixed width 260px on the right (RTL). Content gets padding-right 260px on desktop.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: RTL context: Right-align text by default, ensure flex flows logically (Tailwind handles dir='rtl' automatically for logical properties like ms, me, ps, pe, items-start).

components.buttons: Shadcn buttons. Use primary color for main CTA. Solid background, rounded-md, text-sm font-medium.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (#E7E5E4), soft shadow-sm. Nested radii. Padding p-6.
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Right-aligned columns for text in RTL context. Interactive row hover states.
components.forms: Shadcn forms with Input, Select. Labels right-aligned. Required indicator (asterisk) to the left of the text.
components.charts: Recharts. Use provided chart color palette. Tooltips must have rtl direction.
components.dialogs: Glassmorphism or solid overlay (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal surface solid white with rounded-lg.
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs, custom h-auto instead of fixed h-9. Active state primary color text.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons and links must change background or text color explicitly. Table rows bg-stone-50 on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Primary color #2A5C43 on white is accessible.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, dropdowns, table rows) must have data-testid in kebab-case.

images.description: Islamic geometric pattern, excellent for an educational/training app login page.
Calm nature forest sunrise, good for a welcoming banner on the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce RTL by setting dir='rtl' on the root HTML tag or main container in index.html and layouts.
Use logical CSS properties (ps, pe, ms, me, border-s, border-e) instead of left/right (pl, pr, ml, mr) to ensure RTL compatibility.
Implement the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette for all UI elements. Use primary #2A5C43.
Use Shadcn UI components customized for RTL and the chosen color scheme.
Build a responsive layout with a right sidebar for navigation and a main content area.
Create interactive dashboard charts using Recharts, ensuring they handle Arabic text properly.
Ensure print-friendly styles for the reports pages (@media print). Hide sidebar and navigation during print.
All React files MUST be .js (not .tsx) as per the project requirements.
Include data-testid on every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links, tabs).
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato', 'Syne' fonts. Use 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts and import it in index.css.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons, but ensure any directional icons (like arrows) are mirrored for RTL.
